content: CAN-SPAM is opt-out; CASL is opt-in with CAD $10M penalties. Cold outreach email to curators whose contact is publicly available and relevant to their role can qualify as implied consent under CASL, but the message must relate directly to their role. Transactional emails (order confirmations, account notifications) are exempt from CAN-SPAM commercial requirements. Unsolicited promotional pitches are commercial messages and must include an unsubscribe path and physical address under CAN-SPAM.
